## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] I ran the relevant local build/test commands.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I confirmed there are no unrelated changes in this PR.

## Code review checklist

### Author

- [ ] The PR is focused and small enough to review.
- [ ] API behavior changes are documented.
- [ ] Validation, error handling, logging, and nullability have been considered.
- [ ] Security, secrets, and sensitive data handling have been reviewed.

### Reviewer

- [ ] The implementation matches the PR purpose.
- [ ] Edge cases and failure paths are covered.
- [ ] The code is readable, maintainable, and consistent with the repo style.
- [ ] Automated PR checks have passed before approval.
